pages.title: Free Printable K-Pop Demon Hunters Rumi Bomber Jacket Coloring Page for Kids
pages.description: Download a free printable anime coloring page featuring k-pop demon hunters idol Rumi posing in a trendy cyber outfit. The detailed portrait line art shows the cool girl character wearing a cropped bomber jacket with a riff rumi badge, a stylish chain necklace, and her signature long braided ponytail. This high-quality gaming fashion sheet is perfect for kids and young fans who love coloring modern pop star clothes and beautiful anime character designs.
